name: The Veridian
bathroomsNote: Studios and 1BR units: 1 bath. 2BR units: 2 baths. 1BR+den floor plans (910-949 sq ft) carry 1 bath.

notes.doormanDetail: Marketed by Equity Residential as '24-hour concierge.' At least one resident review source reported that Equity removed the East-side front desk concierge while continuing to advertise 24h service. Confirmed physical front desk/concierge presence; actual 24h staffing not independently verified, so rated 'Likely staffed' rather than 'Confirmed 24h.'
notes.has2BRor1BRDen: 2BR/2BA floor plans confirmed at 1,086-1,227 sq ft. 1BR+den floor plans confirmed at 910-949 sq ft with 1 bath.
notes.building: 457-unit apartment building built 2009, managed by Equity Residential. Art Deco architecture, eco-friendly green roof, steps from Silver Spring Metro.
notes.amenities: Rooftop pool and sundeck, two fitness centers with cardio theater, resident pub, conference and dining rooms, guest suite, controlled-access entry, garage parking.
notes.pets: Dogs and cats permitted. Up to 3 of each. Dogs up to 75 lbs. Monthly pet rent: $65/dog, $50/cat. One-time deposit: $300/pet.
